markdown:
# Periapt of Wound Closure

- **Weight**: 1 lb.

While wearing this pendant, you gain the following benefits.

## Life Preservation

Whenever you make a [[death_saving_throw Saving Throw]], you can change a roll of 9 or lower to a 10, turning a failed save into a successful one.

## Natural Healing Boost

Whenever you roll a [[hit_point_dice Point Die]] to regain [[hit_points Points]], double the number of [[hit_points Points]] it restores.
